title: Squishables
description: A chaotic plushie mod Squeeze em collect em wear em trash em Features plushies from Murder Drones TADC and more with secret expressions Player Plushies (any username!) RGB Wool and THE TRASHER 3000 :3
body:
REQUIRED LIBRARIES — install all three or the mod wont work

--- # I NEED MODELLERS FOR THE MOD I AM REALLY BAD AT MODELLING SO IF ANYONE WANTS TO HELP ME WITH MODELLING PLEASE REACH OUT TO ME ON DISCORD "fervantplate" PLEASE # Murder Drones Mod Hello Everyone this mod is a passion project that i started making after i realized "Man there isnt any MD plushie mods" And this is it ## Basics There is a bunch of Plushies that are craftable now and more keeps getting added every update - N 1 Iron and 1 Yellow wool It has variants some are locked find clues - Uzi 1 Iron and 1 Purple wool The gremlin at her fullest - Cyn Her recipe is weird so imma gonna not tell it :3 - Cyn Maid Cyn but maid version :3 - J Doll Lizzy Tessa Kinger all craftable now - Caine from TADC because why not - Ribbit just a lil frog - Player Plush Craft a Steve plush and shift right click it to type any username and it will get THEIR skin its so cool you can make plushies of your friends - RGB Wool Wool but it cycles thru all the colors looks rlly cool craft it with white wool + red green blue dye AND if you shear it it turns into a Player Plush - Sigma Block sigma - Gabe now reacts when you trash plushies up to the 80th one good luck getting all of them - Pomni plush created by @officiallydeadduchess on discord Thats it ### :3
